g.text: Cricbuzz - Cricket Match Simulator (Annotated for Interview)
Trace: "T20 match starts. Team A bats. Bowler bowls, batsman hits a 4. Score updated via Observer. After 20 overs, Team B chases."
two teams, a venue, a matchType, and
pluggable. T20: 20 overs, max 5 per bowler.
One new class. Match code unchanged."
On wicket: next from queue replaces striker."
Enforces max overs per bowler (5 in T20)."
start(): select openers, loop through overs,
select bowler per over, swap striker after each."
startOver(): loop until 6 NORMAL balls bowled.
if not: random runs (1/2/4/6). Swap striker
Team A bats 20 overs. Each over: select bowler (max 5 per bowler),
bowl 6 legal balls. Each ball: determine wicket (20%) or runs
Inning 2: Team B chases target. First to reach target wins."
T20Match (20 overs, max 5/bowler) vs OneDayMatch (50, max 10)
Inning -> Over (6 legal balls) -> Ball (runs or wicket)
